title: melicope obtusifolia
intro: Melicope obtusifolia, also known as yellow Hawaii neem, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its bioactive compounds, including limonoids and flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Melicope obtusifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiviral properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and viral infections.
